title: Property Consultant - ATS Infrastructure - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - ATS Infrastructure - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!
